Home.description: The home container assumes a Three.js-led opening, followed by project highlights and a closing contact section.
Home.showcaseDescription: The home route previews a few selected cards first, while the full collection can live on the work archive page.
Home.title: An opening frame with room for motion.

Guest.description: Guestbook input will move into a modal feature later. For now, this page focuses on the public intro and reading experience.
Guest.item1: Public message area optimized for reading
Guest.item2: Writing will move into a later create-guestbook-entry feature
Guest.item3: The page only handles composition and data fetching
Guest.title: Guest interactions stay lightweight and modal-driven.

Blog.description: For now, the page keeps the list and base metadata structure only. Search, tag filters and comments will ship as separate features later.
Blog.title: Technical writing, tags, search and comments come later.

Work.showcaseDescription: Unlike the compact preview on the home route, this page shows the full collection of project cards.

Contact.description: This closing area reserves space for a short motion cue and a direct contact prompt.
Contact.title: A compact closing section with motion.
